title: Premium PU Stone Panels in Gurgaon & Delhi NCR
metatitle: PU Stone Panels Supplier & Dealer in Gurgaon | Goals Floors
shortDescription: Looking for the best PU Stone Panels in Gurgaon? Goals Floors is your top wholesale supplier and dealer for lightweight, waterproof PU stone cladding. Perfect for TV walls, cafes, and luxury interiors across Delhi NCR with zero cement work required.
longDescription: Goals Floors is the leading supplier and dealer of premium PU Stone Panels in Gurgaon, Noida, and across Delhi NCR. Engineered for luxury interior wall designs, our PU Stone Panels are the ultimate solution for TV background walls, hotel lobbies, bedroom feature walls, and restaurant interiors. Unlike heavy natural stone cladding, our high-density polyurethane (PU) stone is 90% lighter, 100% waterproof, and installs rapidly without any messy cement work. These artificial stone panels provide an ultra-realistic 3D stone texture while significantly reducing structural wall load. Ideal for modern Gurugram homes, cafes, and commercial projects, our panels are fire-retardant (Class B1), moisture-resistant, and tailored for Indian weather. Available in massive 1200mm x 600mm sheets with 30mm and 60mm thickness options, we offer wholesale pricing and direct delivery across the NCR region.

features.title: Lightweight PU Stone Panels
features.description: It weighs almost 90% less than real natural stone. This means it puts zero heavy structural load on your walls and is extremely easy to transport to high-rise apartments across Gurugram.

features.title: Hyper-Realistic Natural Stone Finish
features.description: These panels are molded directly from real stone slabs. Every rough texture, vein, and organic cut is captured perfectly so it delivers an authentic architectural look without feeling artificial.

features.title: Easy Installation Without Cement
features.description: Say goodbye to messy cement, water, and sand. These PU stone panels can be easily cut with a normal wood saw and pasted directly onto the wall using strong structural PU glue, saving immense labor costs and time.

features.title: 100% Waterproof & Anti-Fungal
features.description: High-density polyurethane does not absorb any moisture. This makes the panels completely safe from water damage, fungus, or swelling, perfectly solving the common wall dampness (seelan) issues in Delhi NCR.

features.title: Fire Safe & Sound Absorbing
features.description: Manufactured with Class B1 fire-retardant properties for maximum commercial safety. Additionally, the thick foam core naturally absorbs sound echoes, dramatically improving the acoustics of your room or cafe.

applications: PU Stone TV Wall Designs for Living Rooms
Luxury Living Room Feature Walls in Gurgaon
installation: This is the fastest stone installation system available in the market today. You do not need any messy mortar or wet work. The 1200x600mm PU panels can be easily cut to size and pasted onto any flat, dust-free surface (like plaster, plywood, or drywall) using heavy-duty PU adhesives. For high walls, commercial lobbies, or ceilings, concealed screws are driven through the joints for permanent structural safety.
maintenance: PU Stone panels require absolutely zero maintenance. Since the polyurethane surface is non-porous, it does not absorb dust, moisture, or liquid stains. You can easily keep it pristine by wiping it with a damp cloth or using a vacuum cleaner with a brush attachment to clean the deep 3D rock textures.

faqs.question: What is PU stone?
faqs.answer:
PU stone is a lightweight decorative wall cladding panel made from polyurethane that replicates the appearance of natural stone.

It is designed to provide the look of real stone without the weight, installation complexity, or structural load associated with natural stone. PU stone is commonly used for feature walls, commercial interiors, facades, and decorative exterior applications.

faqs.question: How much does PU stone cost?
faqs.answer:
PU stone in India typically costs between ₹180 and ₹600 per square foot depending on design, thickness, finish, and brand.

• Basic PU stone panels: ₹180–₹300 per sq. ft.
• Mid-range decorative panels: ₹300–₹450 per sq. ft.
• Premium textured designs: ₹450–₹600+ per sq. ft.

Installation charges may be additional based on wall condition and project requirements.

faqs.question: Is PU stone heavy?
faqs.answer:
No, PU stone is significantly lighter than natural stone and can be installed on most walls without additional structural reinforcement.

Most PU stone panels weigh only a fraction of traditional stone cladding, making transportation, handling, and installation much easier.

faqs.question: Is PU stone good for outdoor?
faqs.answer:
Yes, high-quality PU stone is suitable for outdoor applications when it has UV-resistant and weather-resistant properties.

In Gurugram and Delhi NCR, PU stone is commonly used on exterior feature walls because it can withstand high summer temperatures and seasonal weather conditions. However, product quality plays a major role in long-term performance.

faqs.question: How is PU stone installed?
faqs.answer:
PU stone is typically installed using construction adhesive, screws, or a combination of both depending on the surface and application.

• The wall surface is cleaned and leveled.
• Panels are aligned and fixed using adhesive.
• Joints and edges are finished for a seamless appearance.

The installation process is generally faster and cleaner than natural stone cladding.

faqs.question: Is PU stone water resistant?
faqs.answer:
Yes, PU stone is highly water resistant and performs well in areas exposed to moisture.

Its closed-cell polyurethane structure helps resist water absorption, making it suitable for many interior and exterior applications. In areas affected by seelan or damp walls, proper surface preparation is still important before installation.

faqs.question: What are the disadvantages of PU stone?
faqs.answer:
PU stone has some limitations despite its aesthetic and installation advantages.

• It may not feel as solid as natural stone.
• Low-quality panels can fade or deteriorate under prolonged UV exposure.
• Sharp impacts can damage the surface more easily than real stone.

Choosing premium-grade panels helps minimize these concerns.

faqs.question: How long does a PU stone last?
faqs.answer:
Quality PU stone can last 10 to 20 years or more when properly installed and maintained.

The lifespan depends on product quality, exposure to sunlight, environmental conditions, and installation standards. Premium UV-resistant products generally offer the best long-term durability.

faqs.question: Which is better, PVC or PU?
faqs.answer:
PU is generally better for achieving a realistic stone appearance, while PVC is better for budget-friendly decorative wall coverings.

• PU offers deeper textures and a more natural stone look.
• PVC is usually less expensive.
• PU is often preferred for premium feature walls and facades.

For many high-end projects in Delhi NCR, PU stone is selected when aesthetics are the primary priority.

faqs.question: How do you identify genuine PU stone?
faqs.answer:
Genuine PU stone can be identified by its lightweight construction, realistic texture, consistent finish, and durable polyurethane core.

• The panel should feel lightweight compared to real stone.
• Surface textures should closely resemble natural stone patterns.
• Edges and backing should show a uniform polyurethane structure.

Reputable manufacturers also provide product specifications, warranty information, and quality certifications.

installationSteps.title: Layout Planning
points: First, dry-lay the panels on the floor to check the stone pattern and color mix.
Plan your cuts carefully to minimize any material wastage.

installationSteps.title: Cutting to Size
points: Measure the wall and cut the panels easily using any standard wood-cutting saw.
Lightly sand the cut edges for a perfectly flat and clean fit.

installationSteps.title: Adhesion & Fixing
points: Apply strong structural PU adhesive (like 3M or Dow) in blobs on the back of the panel.
Press the panel firmly onto the clean wall surface.
For high ceilings or walls, drive concealed screws into the overlapping joints for extra grip.

installationSteps.title: Finishing Touches
points: Use matching color sealant or acrylic paint in the joints to hide them completely.
Touch up any visible cut edges with matching paint for a 100% realistic look.
